_comment: Upstream sources for `npm run sync`. Each entry binds a YAML codelist to
an upstream + fetcher. Lists without an entry are skipped (UN/CEFACT lists
have no clean machine-readable upstream and change rarely).
format 'cldr'    — Unicode CLDR JSON (cldr-json on a CDN). Permissive
country/currency names come from here, NOT Debian
fetcher pulls one file per declared locale.

icd-schemes.yaml.url: https://docs.peppol.eu/edelivery/codelists/v9.6/Peppol Code Lists - Participant identifier schemes v9.6.json
